question text: What happens to air molecules when the air gets warm?
answers: [{'answer_text': 'They move closer together and pressure goes up.', 'text': 'They move closer together and pressure goes up.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'They turn into liquid water.', 'text': 'They turn into liquid water.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'They disappear completely.', 'text': 'They disappear completely.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'They spread out and rise, which lowers the pressure.', 'text': 'They spread out and rise, which lowers the pressure.', 'weight': 100}, {'answer_text': 'They freeze and become heavy.', 'text': 'They freeze and become heavy.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'They turn into solid rocks.', 'text': 'They turn into solid rocks.', 'weight': 0}]
a: They move closer together and pressure goes up.
d: They spread out and rise, which lowers the pressure.

question text: Which scientific law explains why the balloon buggy moves forward when air shoots backward?

question text: How is the air inside an inflated balloon different from the air outside of it?
answers: [{'answer_text': 'It is at a much higher pressure (compressed).', 'text': 'It is at a much higher pressure (compressed).', 'weight': 100}, {'answer_text': 'It is much colder than the outside air.', 'text': 'It is much colder than the outside air.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'It is at a lower pressure.', 'text': 'It is at a lower pressure.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'It has no oxygen inside.', 'text': 'It has no oxygen inside.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'It is exactly the same pressure.', 'text': 'It is exactly the same pressure.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'It is made of liquid.', 'text': 'It is made of liquid.', 'weight': 0}]
a: It is at a much higher pressure (compressed).
b: It is much colder than the outside air.
c: It is at a lower pressure.
e: It is exactly the same pressure.

question text: If a group is building their car and the wheels do not turn, what is the most likely problem?
answers: [{'answer_text': 'The balloon is too big.', 'text': 'The balloon is too big.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'The car is too light.', 'text': 'The car is too light.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'The floor is too smooth.', 'text': 'The floor is too smooth.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'They used the wrong color balloon.', 'text': 'They used the wrong color balloon.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'The air is too cold.', 'text': 'The air is too cold.', 'weight': 0}, {'answer_text': 'There is too much friction rubbing against the car body or axle.', 'text': 'There is too much friction rubbing against the car body or axle.', 'weight': 100}]
d: They used the wrong color balloon.
f: There is too much friction rubbing against the car body or axle.

question text: If your car moves, but it goes very slowly and does not reach the finish line, how can you improve it?

a: Add more heavy tape and decorations.

f: Put the car on a soft carpet.
